mapper.select: select r.id, r.requirement_code, r.title, r.requirement_type, r.priority, r.status, r.description, r.wbs_id, w.node_name as wbs_name, r.proposer_id, u.real_name as proposer_name, r.created_at from requirement_info r left join wbs_node w on w.id = r.wbs_id left join sys_user u on u.id = r.proposer_id where r.id = #{id} and r.is_deleted = 0

select id, project_id, wbs_id, requirement_code, title, requirement_type, priority, status, description, proposer_id, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, is_deleted from requirement_info where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: update requirement_info set wbs_id = #{wbsId}, title = #{title}, requirement_type = #{requirementType}, priority = #{priority}, status = #{status}, description = #{description}, proposer_id = #{proposerId}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id} and project_id = #{projectId} and is_deleted = 0
